name: EchoRank
description: A polling application that lets users rank options in order of preference, with results determined using the instant runoff voting (IRV) method to ensure a majority winner.

name: Microwd
description: Simplifying attendance tracking with dynamic QR codes that refresh every few seconds, preventing reuse and ensuring secure, real-time verification.

name: Uclid
description: A timed fast-paced math game where players race to solve simple arithmetic problems, featuring real-time multiplayer so users can compete head-to-head.

name: Smokie
description: A fashion site built for buying and selling of products dynamically populated with an admin dashboard. I also built the admin dashboard.

name: Sync
description: Sync streamlines ATM maintenance by detecting faults in real time, automatically dispatching the nearest engineer, and providing live health data, diagnostics, and AI-powered repair suggestions before arrival.

name: Signan
description: A coach-learner platform where coaches create and manage courses, while learners enroll, track progress, and set personalized goals.
